scrum-master.description: Generates sprint progress reports and standup summaries for CMD - Meeting Join (US)

bug-killer.description: Scans assigned repos for open bugs, analyzes root causes, and submits PR fixes

emailer.description: Manages Gmail inboxes - scans, classifies, generates digests across multiple mailboxes

auditor.description: Consolidates memories, generates sprint progress reports, compares run results, audits permissions, and generates daily HTML reports

poster.description: Posts daily Bug-AutoPilot summary to Teams Bug-Autopilot channel from ADO query data

hang-scout.description: Detects hung agent jobs, diagnoses via process tree and py-spy, kills if safe, files issues for new patterns

dreamer.description: Tracks ideas, visions, and wish-list items - inventories dreams, plans next steps, and resumes explorations

researcher.description: Deep research agent - combines log analysis, code tracing, Kusto telemetry, Edge CDP scraping, Graph API lookups, ADO operations, and Agency Teams messaging to investigate complex issues end-to-end

approver.description: Manual approval agent for web-based approval workflows (FFv2 flights, etc.)
